name: Java / log4j / SLF4J Logback
sampleLines: 2024-04-28T04:02:04.456Z WARN [http-nio-8080-exec-1] o.s.web.servlet.PageNotFound - No mapping for GET /favicon.ico
2024-04-28 04:02:05.789 ERROR [pool-1-thread-3] com.example.Worker$Inner: Task failed after 3 retries
description: Adapted from lnav src/formats/java_log.json (BSD-2-Clause). Matches the Logback / log4j2 / Spring Boot default `%d %-5level [%thread] %logger - %msg` PatternLayout (see Logback 'Layouts' and log4j2 PatternLayout docs). The logger/message separator accepts either `logger - message` (Logback default) or `logger: message` (log4j fused-colon shape); the `\s*[-:]\s+` shape is deliberate so the colon-fused case still captures the logger as its own column instead of letting it fold into the message. Severity tokens include SLF4J's TRACE..ERROR plus java.util.logging's SEVERE / WARNING / FATAL.
